name: First Dungeon Scrap Knife
description: Blue's first self-forged knife from low-grade dungeon ore, marking his start as a blacksmith.

name: Rurik's Broken Warhammer
description: The warhammer that once shattered demon armor, now damaged and unused after Rurik lost his arm.

name: Moonveil Royal Blade
description: An elven royal magic knight sword, currently sealed within the Elf King's domain.

name: Fallen Shell Crystal
description: The crystal that fell from the sky housing Lyriel, anchor of their life-oath contract.

name: Luna's Arcane Staff
description: Luna Starweaver's staff, used for protective and utility spells in Blue's party.
